title: Shakshuka with Middle Eastern Spices
description: A flavorful twist on the classic North African dish, featuring eggs poached in a spicy tomato sauce with Middle Eastern flair.

ingredients.name: eastern spices
ingredients.notes: ground cumin, ground coriander, smoked paprika

ingredients.name: shakshuka
ingredients.notes: crushed tomatoes with garlic and chili peppers

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the crushed tomatoes, spices, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Create 4 wells in the sauce and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to your desired doneness.
Serve the shakshuka hot, garnished with fresh herbs and crusty bread on the side.
